title: stelis carnalis
intro: Stelis carnalis, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, and it has been reported to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Stelis carnalis are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. Stelis carnalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and it is often consumed in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
